title: mira
subtitle: game jam release
description: My latest release, Mira was made in less than three days for the Virginia Inter-Collegiate Game Jam 2026.
content:
Mira is a short atmospheric sci-fi experience set on the planet Rema.
Play as a girl, Rea, in her sheltered home city, where she lives with her father after her mothers mysterious disappearance. Join Rea and discover her world with her.

Features:

• A short, narrative-focused experience

• Original soundtrack

• Atmospheric 3D open world to explore

• A story about memory, addiction and carving your own path

This is my first ever 3D game! I created it for a game jam over 3 days. I focused on atmosphere and storytelling, and I really hope it resonates with you. I do plan on doing a complete art and music overhaul one day, but for now: Enjoy! :)

This game was a long time coming, my first one in fact! I have been working on projects on Scratch, Unity, Godot and Unreal since I was in 5th grade. I have been constantly starting new projects every other month or so for the past few years. Mira was a project to show that if I sat down and committed to a project I could get it done. All of the music, 2d art, (most of) the 3d art and writing was done by me.
